channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Five accused of planning armed break-in at Major General’s residence in Kitengela
item.description: Two Kenya Defence Forces (KDF) soldiers and three civilians have been formally charged with conspiring to break into the private home of Major General George Okumu Opondo in Kitengela, Kajiado County....

item.title: NASA’s Artemis advances add pressure on China’s 2030 moon landing plans
item.description: NASA’s recent success with its Artemis lunar mission has intensified global focus on China’s ambition to land astronauts on the moon by 2030. The Artemis II crew became the first humans to travel deep...

item.title: Lahore High Court dismisses petition by unrelated lawyer against acquittal of PM Shehbaz and Hamza in money laundering case
item.description: Lahore High Court ne Lahore mein kaha hai ke koi bhi private shakhs jo case se koi connection na rakhta ho, usay NAS (locus standi) nahi hoti ke kisi accused ki ba’is (acquittal) ko challenge kar saka...

item.title: Pakistan’s Energy Crisis Highlights Urgent Need for Climate and Economic Reforms
item.description: In September 2025, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif declared a climate emergency, but most government ministries largely ignored it. By March 2026, the US-Israeli conflict with Iran blocked the Strait of...

item.title: Denise Richards ordered to pay spousal support to Aaron Phypers amid ongoing divorce
item.description: Denise Richards is reportedly upset after a judge ruled that she must make temporary spousal support payments to her estranged husband, Aaron Phypers, as their divorce continues. The pair, married for...

item.title: Vijay's participation in Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026 raises concerns about minority vote division
item.description: In the upcoming Tamil Nadu Assembly elections of 2026, the entry of popular actor Vijay as a candidate has ignited discussions about the potential impact on minority voting patterns in the state. Poli...

item.title: Justice Louise Taylor Appointed as ACT's New Chief Magistrate
item.description: Justice Louise Taylor has been appointed as the new Chief Magistrate of the ACT, becoming the first Aboriginal woman to hold the position. Taylor, who has previously served as a magistrate since 2018 ...

item.title: April 9, 2026 Daily Horoscopes: What the Stars Foretell
item.description: This horoscope reading for April 9, 2026, offers insights and predictions for each zodiac sign. According to Sally Brompton, Aries individuals can expect a surge in energy and ambition with Mars enter...

item.title: March 2026 Marks Record-Breaking Heat Across the U.S. Amid Anticipated Strong El Niño
item.description: In March 2026, the continental United States experienced unprecedented heat, marking the hottest March in 132 years. Average temperatures reached 50.85°F, which is 9.35°F above the 20th-century March ...

item.title: Traffic Disruptions in Nairobi CBD Due to President's Engagements
item.description: Traffic within Nairobi's Central Business District (CBD) will be temporarily disrupted today due to the closure of key roads. This comes as President William Ruto engages in official events at the Ken...

item.title: Citizens’ responsibility in Africa’s poor governance highlighted
item.description: In a strongly worded letter published by the Sowetan on 9 April 2026, reader Thami Zwane argues that Africa’s widespread poverty and poor governance are not solely the result of corrupt leaders, coups...

item.title: President Samia Introduces Cost-Cutting Measures Amid Global Fuel Price Challenges
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has asked all government offices in Tanzania to reduce fuel consumption in response to rising global oil prices caused by tensions involving the United States, Israel, an...

item.title: Bluefins Ready for National Swimming Championships with 13 Swimmers
item.description: The Bluefins swimming club has confirmed a competitive squad of 13 swimmers for the 2026 Tanzania National Club Championship (TNCC) set for this weekend at the International School of Tanganyika (IST)...

item.title: Twenty Twenty Six review – Hugh Bonneville returns in a lukewarm World Cup mockumentary
item.description: Twenty Twenty Six, the latest mockumentary by John Morton, brings back Hugh Bonneville as Ian Fletcher, now the incoming director of integrity at an unnamed international football organisation. Set in...

item.title: Record-Breaking Neutrino May Be Linked to Exploding Primordial Black Hole
item.description: In 2023, scientists observed a neutrino hitting Earth with an energy level far beyond any known natural cosmic source, about 100,000 times greater than the output of the Large Hadron Collider. Researc...

item.title: Kenyan Influencer Eric Omondi Leads Earnings Chart with Sh57 Million
item.description: Things are looking good for Kenyan content creators, especially comedian Eric Omondi! According to a new report by Odipo Dev, Eric has emerged as the top-earning social media influencer in Kenya, raki...

item.title: Man from B.C. Faces Charges Following Commercial Vehicle Crash on Hwy. 11
item.description: A man from British Columbia has been charged following a commercial vehicle crash on Highway 11 in Northern Ontario. The incident, which took place on April 8, 2026, involved a large truck and has spa...

item.title: Ikungi MP Urges Government to Expand Fuel Storage and Subsidies to Stabilise Economy
item.description: On 8 April 2026, during the parliamentary debate on the Prime Minister's Office budget for the 2026/2027 financial year, Elibariki Kingu, MP for Ikungi West, advised the Tanzanian government to invest...

item.title: Winnipeg resident loses thousands to online scammers, warns others of growing fraud trend
item.description: A Winnipeg woman has come forward after losing thousands of dollars to an online scam, expressing her disbelief and frustration at how easily she was deceived. The incident highlights the growing soph...

item.title: Kyiv calls on US to push Russia for ceasefire after Iran truce
item.description: Kyiv has called upon the United States to pressure Russia to end its invasion of Ukraine, highlighting the success of US decisiveness in achieving a ceasefire with Iran. Ukrainian Foreign Minister And...
